overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a flying aerodyne vehicle navigating through the futuristic Night City in Cyberpunk 2077. The vehicle takes off from a murky industrial waterway, ascends over dense urban infrastructure, and maneuvers between towering skyscrapers adorned with neon signage.

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle at low altitude over a murky industrial canal between concrete embankments

entered.detail: murky green water filling the canal below the vehicle
tall concrete walls lining both sides of the waterway
large rusted industrial pipes and structures along the canal walls
metal highway overpass spanning the canal ahead
distant neon advertisements visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Flying low over a murky industrial canal flanked by concrete walls and rusted pipes. The vehicle maintains steady forward motion toward a distant overpass in bright midday sunlight.

events.description: vehicle ascends rapidly from low waterway to high altitude revealing expansive city panorama

agents.ego_description: rapidly gaining altitude to survey the sprawling urban landscape and highway systems below

entered.detail: complex multi-level highway interchange visible below
distant futuristic skyline of towering skyscrapers
tall industrial chimneys emitting white smoke
elevated roadways and ramps crisscrossing the urban fabric

segments.scene_description: The vehicle climbs rapidly from the canal, revealing a vast urban sprawl of highways, industrial smokestacks, and distant skyscrapers under a clear blue sky.

agents.ego_description: cruising at high altitude over the dense urban grid, navigating between clusters of skyscrapers

entered.detail: tall modern glass and steel skyscrapers surrounding the flight path
closely packed high-rise buildings forming the urban canyon
white industrial smoke drifting across the cityscape

segments.scene_description: Cruising high above the city center, passing over complex highway interchanges and between towering glass skyscrapers with industrial smoke visible in the distance.

events.description: vehicle banks sharply left and right to navigate through tight corridors between commercial towers

agents.ego_description: banking sharply through narrow aerial corridors between commercial buildings with large neon advertisements

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'nico' branding on the left building
curved elevated highway ramps winding between buildings
floating holographic advertisements in the distance

segments.scene_description: Maneuvering through a neon-lit commercial district, banking around skyscrapers and past large digital billboards including a prominent 'nico' sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow building canyon with digital signage

events.description: approaching large building with digital '10' signage and entering narrow building canyon

agents.ego_description: slowing down and descending into a narrow gap between buildings, approaching a structure with large digital numbering

entered.detail: tall building with large illuminated number '10' on the facade
large purple and yellow neon corporate signage on the building
tight aerial corridor between closely packed high-rise buildings

segments.scene_description: Approaching a distinctive building marked with a large digital '10', the vehicle slows and descends into a narrow canyon between towering structures with purple neon accents.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a gritty industrial waterway into the expansive heights of a futuristic urban skyline. It begins by gliding low over a murky canal, flanked by concrete walls and rusted pipes under the glare of bright midday sunlight. As the vehicle climbs rapidly, the narrow corridor gives way to a vast urban sprawl of highways and industrial smokestacks stretching toward a clear blue horizon. The scene then opens further as the camera reaches a high altitude, cruising over complex highway interchanges and weaving between towering glass skyscrapers while distant plumes of industrial smoke drift across the city center.

The shot follows a continuous flight through a vibrant commercial district that gradually descends into a claustrophobic urban canyon. It begins by banking through a dense cluster of skyscrapers, gliding past massive digital billboards and a prominent nico sign. As the vehicle maneuvers through the neon-lit skyline, the open airspace begins to tighten. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches a distinctive building marked with a large digital 10, slowing its pace to dive downward. Finally, the perspective plunges into a narrow corridor between towering structures, where the surrounding light transitions into deep purple neon accents.
